workshoptitle: Explore the New AI Interactive Report Feature with SCM Data

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Workshop overview, audience, objectives, and lab flow for the new AI Interactive Report feature.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Create a SCM Application
tutorials.description: Install the SCM sample application, review the dataset, and run the existing report.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Configure an AI Service
tutorials.description: Configure the provider, credential, model, and connection for APEX AI features.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Create an Interactive Report using Natural Language
tutorials.description: Create the replenishment view, build the report page, and enable natural language support.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Configure Column-Level AI Attributes
tutorials.description: Add SCM-specific AI context and reference data for report columns.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Use Search with AI
tutorials.description: Test AI search prompts, row search behavior, and chip refinement.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Use the Interactive Report Chat Assistant
tutorials.description: Use chat prompts to analyze, refine, visualize, and save report views.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to common problems and directions for receiving live help.
